slides.title: A strong core *protects your back*.
slides.sub: Your core is a natural brace around your spine. Trained gently, it can guard your back for decades.

slides.title: Your core is a brace
slides.body: The muscles around your middle wrap and steady your spine. A strong core *can support* every lift and bend.

slides.title: It matters more with age
slides.body: As the years pass, a sturdy midsection helps you move safely. A weak one *may leave* the back exposed.

slides.title: Train it gently
slides.body: Planks, dead bugs and loaded carries build real bracing strength. Quality and control beat endless crunches.

slides.title: A little, often
slides.body: A few focused minutes most days *adds up* over time. Consistency builds a brace you can rely on.

slides.title: Guard your back for years
slides.body: A steady core habit costs little and gives a lot. It *may support* a stronger, more capable back.

slides.title: Build a brace that *lasts*.
slides.body: Vibe Health helps you track the strength and movement habits that keep your core and back capable, all in one daily score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
A strong core is a natural brace for your spine, and it pays off for decades. 🌿

Planks, dead bugs and loaded carries build real bracing strength, no endless crunches required. A few focused minutes most days is all it takes. Save this. 🔖
